parsed_data.reason: Repair invalid research plan: replace all legacy <...> placeholder syntax with proper symbolic references ({{stage:N.run_id}}, {{stage:N.snapshot_ref}}), add missing depends_on: [0] to stage 4 for its symbolic reference to stage 0, and reconstruct truncated instructions while preserving original intent.
parsed_data.plan_markdown:
# BTCUSDT Automated Trading Strategy Research Plan

## Goal
Continuously improve automated trading strategy performance on BTCUSDT via MCP dev_space1. Maximize net PnL and trade count while minimizing max drawdown. Validate against the active-signal-v1 baseline (Sharpe 1.06, +13% return, 498 trades, max DD 2.4%).

## Baseline
- **Strategy**: active-signal-v1
- **Symbol**: BTCUSDT / 1h
- **Metrics**: Sharpe ~1.06, Return ~+13%, Trades ~498, Max DD ~2.4%

## Stage Overview
| Stage | Name | Depends On | Hypothesis |
|-------|------|------------|------------|
| 0 | Baseline Reproduction | — | Anchor a concrete baseline run |
| 1 | Multi-Timeframe Momentum Features | 0 | Higher-TF confluence filters counter-trend entries |
| 2 | Volume-Weighted Signal Enhancement | 0 | OBV + volume breakout confirms institutional flow |
| 3 | Regime-Aware Trade Filtering | 1, 2 | ADX/ATR gates prevent trading in adverse conditions |
| 4 | Final Comparison & Promotion | 0, 3 | Validate winner against baseline for promotion |

## Workers
- qwen-1, qwen-2 (parallel stages 1 & 2)

## Decision Gate Policy
- PROMOTE: meets all thresholds; advances to next stage
- WATCHLIST: misses primary but within tolerance; retained for future study
- REJECT: fails hard constraint (e.g., drawdown > 3%); abandoned

tasks.theory: Reproduce the active-signal-v1 baseline on BTCUSDT to lock a concrete run_id and snapshot_ref. This anchors all future comparisons and ensures the MCP environment is functioning correctly before exploring new ideas.
agent_instructions: Run baseline backtest: backtests_runs(action='run', strategy='active-signal-v1', symbol='BTCUSDT', interval='1h', snapshot_name='baseline-repro-v1')

Inspect the result using the run_id returned by the previous step: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:0.run_id}}', view='detail') to verify Sharpe ~ 1.06, return ~ +13%, trades ~ 498, max DD ~ 2.4%
Record the run_id and snapshot_ref for downstream stages

tasks.theory: Adding higher-timeframe confluence (4h RSI, 4h EMA200 slope, 1h MACD histogram direction) to the signal logic should filter out counter-trend entries that drag on win rate. Multi-TF agreement is a well-documented edge in systematic strategies and may improve Sharpe from ~1.06 toward 1.2+ without sacrificing trade count excessively.
agent_instructions: Clone the baseline snapshot: snapshots(action='fork', snapshot_ref='{{stage:0.snapshot_ref}}', new_name='multi-tf-momentum-v1')
Modify the strategy to add 4h RSI(14) > 50 filter AND 1h EMA200 slope positive as entry conditions

Run backtest: backtests_runs(action='run', strategy='multi-tf-momentum-v1', symbol='BTCUSDT', interval='1h', snapshot_name='multi-tf-momentum-v1', params={'rsi_4h_period': 14, 'ema_200_slope_tf': '1h', 'rsi_4h_threshold': 50})
Inspect the result: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:1.run_id}}', view='detail')
Compare against baseline: backtests_runs(action='compare', run_ids=['{{stage:0.run_id}}', '{{stage:1.run_id}}']) and record which metrics improved

tasks.theory: Incorporating OBV (On-Balance Volume) slope and volume-at-price breakout confirmation should improve entry quality by ensuring trades align with institutional flow direction. Volume divergence often precedes price reversals, so a volume filter may both improve win rate and reduce drawdowns.
agent_instructions: Clone the baseline snapshot: snapshots(action='fork', snapshot_ref='{{stage:0.snapshot_ref}}', new_name='volume-weighted-v1')
Add OBV 20-period slope > 0 as a mandatory entry filter, plus volume > 20-period MA as breakout confirmation

Run backtest: backtests_runs(action='run', strategy='volume-weighted-v1', symbol='BTCUSDT', interval='1h', snapshot_name='volume-weighted-v1', params={'obv_slope_period': 20, 'volume_ma_period': 20, 'volume_breakout_mult': 1.2})
Inspect the result: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:2.run_id}}', view='detail')
Compare against baseline: backtests_runs(action='compare', run_ids=['{{stage:0.run_id}}', '{{stage:2.run_id}}']) and record which metrics improved

tasks.theory: Adding an ADX-based regime classifier (trending vs ranging) and ATR-based volatility gate should prevent the strategy from trading in adverse conditions. Trend-following signals underperform in choppy markets; regime gating should preserve capital during those periods.
agent_instructions: Compare stage 1 vs stage 2 results: backtests_runs(action='compare', run_ids=['{{stage:1.run_id}}', '{{stage:2.run_id}}']) to identify which performed better

Fork the better-performing snapshot: if stage 1 won, call snapshots(action='fork', snapshot_ref='{{stage:1.snapshot_ref}}', new_name='regime-filter-v1'); if stage 2 won, call snapshots(action='fork', snapshot_ref='{{stage:2.snapshot_ref}}', new_name='regime-filter-v1')
Add ADX(14) > 25 for trend regime and ATR(14) within 0.5x-2.0x of its 50-period MA as volatility gate; disable entries outside this band

Run backtest: backtests_runs(action='run', strategy='regime-filter-v1', symbol='BTCUSDT', interval='1h', snapshot_name='regime-filter-v1', params={'adx_period': 14, 'adx_threshold': 25, 'atr_period': 14, 'atr_ma_period': 50, 'atr_low_mult': 0.5, 'atr_high_mult': 2.0})
Inspect the result: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:3.run_id}}', view='detail')
Compare against the winning parent stage: backtests_runs(action='compare', run_ids=['{{stage:1.run_id}}', '{{stage:3.run_id}}']) or use stage:2.run_id as appropriate to confirm improvement

tasks.theory: The final ensemble (best variant plus regime filtering) must be validated head-to-head against the original baseline to confirm genuine improvement. If it clears all gates, promote the new snapshot as the production candidate.
agent_instructions: Inspect the stage 3 result: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:3.run_id}}', view='detail')

Run a fresh backtest of the regime-filtered strategy for independent confirmation: backtests_runs(action='run', strategy='regime-filter-v1', symbol='BTCUSDT', interval='1h', snapshot_name='regime-filter-v1')
Inspect the confirmation run: backtests_runs(action='inspect', run_id='{{stage:4.run_id}}', view='detail')
Compare final ensemble against the stage 0 baseline: backtests_runs(action='compare', run_ids=['{{stage:0.run_id}}', '{{stage:4.run_id}}']) to confirm net improvement in Sharpe, PnL, and drawdown
If all decision gates pass, promote the snapshot: snapshots(action='promote', snapshot_ref='{{stage:3.snapshot_ref}}', target='production')

anti_patterns_new.description: Tuning parameters to exact baseline period without out-of-sample validation
anti_patterns_new.evidence_summary: No evidence yet; plan includes confirmation backtest in stage 4 to mitigate

anti_patterns_new.description: Adding too many configurable parameters per stage makes results non-reproducible
anti_patterns_new.evidence_summary: Each stage limited to 3-6 explicit params; monitored going forward

parsed_data.cumulative_summary: Starting fresh research cycle. Baseline active-signal-v1 on BTCUSDT 1h yields Sharpe 1.06, +13% return, 498 trades, max DD 2.4%. Three improvement vectors to explore: multi-timeframe momentum confluence (stage 1), volume-weighted signal enhancement (stage 2), and regime-aware trade filtering (stage 3). Stages 1 and 2 run in parallel from the same baseline fork, with the winner feeding stage 3 for regime gating.
principles: Every variant must be compared head-to-head against the locked baseline run_id before promotion
Max drawdown hard cap at 3.0% for any individual stage; 2.5% for final promotion
Preserve trade count above 200 to avoid over-filtering into negligible sample sizes
Use symbolic references {{stage:N.field}} for all inter-stage data flow; never hard-code IDs
Each stage must produce an inspect-able run_id and snapshot_ref for reproducibility
parsed_data.memory_update: Initial plan created with 5 stages (0-4). Fixed all legacy <...> placeholders by replacing with proper symbolic refs. Added depends_on:[0] to stage 4 for baseline comparison. Stages 1 and 2 are parallel candidates branching from stage 0 baseline.
